sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15481" key="a)rrenotoki/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρρενο-τοκία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n15481.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bearing of male children,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.36</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
